form.formComment: Comes here in the right form. Won by 15m as favourite (25m) at Mauquenchy beating Kilou D'ymer in 6-10yo handicap on March 16 at $1.40. Two runs back posted a big 19m win as favourite at this track beating Laponie D'emma in 5-6yo mare euro open restricted race on February 27 at $1.80. Rates highly. Big chance.

form.formComment: Didn't do much at the last run, 5th over 2850m at Laval, beaten 33m by Hasard in 7-11yo euro open handicap on March 11 at $32. Before that unplaced over 2450m at Caen well beaten by Indiana Tess in 7-9yo race on March 5 at $110. Happy enough to dismiss.
